horoscopes.title: Aries Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: The last week of April will witness significant focus on finances, and your emotional self, but the changes will be more towards progress, so wake up and smell the coffee. Mars and Mercury are moving through the twelfth house, so you will have some emotional needs, which can only be filled with spiritual talks, and isolation. The events like getting updates from the foreign lands, or long trips, will progress slowly, so you may be a bit impatient about these. You will also go for spiritual practices like prayer and meditation, which will surely pacify you. Since these planets are aspecting the sixth house of work, you will have new events regarding your work as well.

The solar transit through the second house will bring tangible developments regarding finances, possessions and your values. These three factors are going to be active for the next twenty days, so make sure you are taking the right plans regarding these. The Sun will show you the real status of your financial matters, and there are chances to find new income generation methods. The full moon will rise in Scorpio, and that also shows significant developments regarding financial matters. The Sun Moon opposition shows there will be gains as well as expenses too. Moreover, you will be settling some debts, gets pending amount, and think about tax, PF, and insurance too.

Some secret matters will come into the light, especially the areas involving trust, debts and intimacy. If you had applied for a loan or other financial instrument, you will get the update regarding that. Venus is moving through the air sign of Gemini, and that will bring short trips, which will be good for you, as it can also be for professional reasons. You will join new groups, meet new people, and you will also get some profitable contact through this networking. This Venus also will bring opportunities to write, learn, publish and a close conversation with your siblings.

horoscopes.title: Taurus Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: The last week of April will bring more conversations with your friends, and team mates as Mars and Mercury is continuing in the eleventh house. You will be very busy, as there will be a lot of meetings, brainstorming sessions, and community events. The eleventh house indicates long term projects, so you will be actively enquiring about new projects which can give you long term income. There will be multiple opportunities to join a new team, find a new friend, find a social cause to get involved in team work. Since Mars and Mercury are fast planets, the chances to have arguments with the team mates as well.

The solar transit is progressing through the first house and the full moon will rise in Scorpio, which rules your seventh house. There will be some situation where you have to take the lead, but make sure you respect others perspective as well. This is a period where your health, appearance and personality matter a lot. The full moon indicates completions, so you will complete a business deal by signing the document or you will reject that offer. If you were going through a partnership issue, you will settle during this time, or you will quit that relationship.

Venus is moving through Gemini, so you will get more than one income generation ideas, and it can be in freelance or fulltime mode. There will be expensive buys, but make sure you control your expenses, otherwise there will be financial issues. The second house indicates face, so there are chances for you to take some treatment for your face, eyes or even for oral area to increase the beauty. The universe will bring an opportunity to feel good as someone will motivate you, and you also will try to motivate others. You will also get more money, more time, and more visibility.

horoscopes.title: Gemini Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: Mars and Mercury are moving through the eleventh house, so, you will have new opportunities from foreign lands, and there will be international collaborations. This is the time to go for network meetings, and you will find profitable contacts too. However, Mars ad Mercury are fast and furious planets, so there will be arguments within the team settings, but make sure you don’t initiate any such things. This transit will bring new friendships, or issues with an existing friend too. New long term projects will be only possible when you are in good terms with your team members.

The Sun is moving through the twelfth house, and the full Moon will rise in the sixth house, so there will be a strong under current between closures and daily life. Due to the solar transit, you will feel the need to withdraw from some issues, as your role is over or you don’t want to be the part of that crisis. There will be some updates from the foreign lands, or foreign collaborations, but you can expect some delay in the process. The full moon will rise in the sixth house, so there will be minor health related concerns, so you have to take care of your diet, and emotion as well.

Venus is in your sign so, there will be a noticeable shift in your personality, as Venus is a charmer. Being a Gemini, you have the natural charm, and this Venus transit will increase it, so your visibility will increase, and people will take initiative to talk to you. You will try to improve your appearance, so you will but new dress or new accessories. This transit also shows the chances to get new personal and business relationships.

horoscopes.title: Cancer Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: For Cancer Sun, Moon and rising natives, the career will be the important factor as Mars and Mercury are moving through the tenth house. This is a very significant time for job seekers, so they will have to expand the job search, as there are chances for them to get a new job. You can also get updates about your job applications, there will be some announcements regarding your company, or your project. Mars and Mercury are fast and furious, so you will be working in fast paced environment. The tenth house also indicates your image and reputation, so make sure you are highly professional at work, as your managers will notice you.

The Solar transit is moving through the eleventh house, and the full moon will rise in the fifth house, so the Sun and Moon face off will impact the team settings, long term plans and children. There will be new friendships and collective projects coming up, and the opportunities will be open for the next twenty plus days. The full moon will bring completions in some projects, or in your love life, so make sure you choose wise decisions. You will also find the best solution for your children’s issues too.

Venus is moving through the air sign of Gemini, which rules your twelfth house of isolation and detachment, so you will feel like taking a break to find yourself. There will be private talks regarding your emotions, which can lead to healing, but make sure you don’t overshare with unknown people. Venus will bring people from the foreign lands, and also will get updates regarding your foreign collaborations too. The sleep will get better and you will get good dreams, which will give you some signals about the future. Altogether this week is going to be very productive.

horoscopes.title: Leo Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: The last week of April will be very productive, as Mars and Mercury are moving through the ninth house so you will spend more time for long trips, higher studies and spiritual matters. Higher studies will be very important, and you will get such opportunities along for international opportunities. You will also get updates regarding long trips, foreign collaborations, and visa, but Mars can bring some blocks too. Mars and Mercury can make you a rebel, so there are chances for arguments with your teachers and mentors too. Those who work in media, publishing and writing will have new opportunities also.

The Sun is moving through the tenth house, and the full moon will rise in Scorpio, which rules your fourth house of home. There will be some important events in your professional space, like you getting a new job, new opportunities for business owners, and some frictions with your managers. Your managers will notice your work and behaviour at workplace, so make sure you are meeting their expectations. The full moon will bring completion in the real estate deals or you will take some decision to renovate your place. There will be solution for some issues at home, family functions and plans for relocation as well.

You will surely get some positive updates from the long term projects, as there will be some updates regarding a long term project. This Venus will bring some support through your friends, social circles, and your foreign counterparts. This transit will bring long-term projects with financial benefits, but make sure the terms and conditions are clear and legit. Single Leo natives will get the closest chances to meet someone special, and you will spend time with them. This is also a very good time to take part in team collaborations, and brainstorming sessions too.

horoscopes.title: Virgo Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: Mars and Mercury are moving through the eighth house, so the financial matters will be very important for this week as well. Both the planets indicate financial matters, so you will be dealing with matters like loans , taxes, insurance or joint ventures. You will meet a financial consultant for some of these purposes. Both the planets are highly argumentative, so there will be arguments in the joint ventures, so, you will have to be careful with your partners. Sudden expenses will also be the part of this transit, so make sure you are prepared for that. Some private matters can get exposed, so make sure you don’t overshare your matters with everyone.

The solar transit is impacting the ninth house, and the full moon will rise in the third house, so this is a great week for those who work in media and publishing. If you were searching for a publisher, then you will get the closest opportunities to get a good publisher. Long as well short trips will be the part of this week, and they can be for career, and personal matters. Learning, teaching and global ventures will be coming up during this time. There will be important communication with your siblings, friends and network circles too.

Venus transit through the tenth house is showing the need of more focus at work, as Venus is moving through the air sign of Gemini. If you work hard, you will get more appreciation, recognition, or support from your managers, or people from government. There will be new opportunities for job seekers, so you should expand the job search. Those who work in creative sector, own ventures, and fashion sector will have more opportunities too. This is a great phase for good reviews, and your reputation will improve, so use these opportunities wisely.

horoscopes.title: Libra Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: Mars and Mercury are moving through Aries just like the last week, so there will be continuation of events. You can expect some significant events in your spouse’s life like they going to a distant place, or they getting a job. Mars and Mercury are fast planets, so the events like networking, social gatherings and business meets can come up quickly, so you need to be prepared for that. This is the time for conversations with your spouse, partner, or someone from the public domain about new contracts. You can also expect disagreements, so make sure you are diplomatic, so that you can keep a good equation with everyone.

The solar transit is moving through the eighth house, and the full moon will activate your second house during this week. Both indicates significant developments in the financial matters, so you will have to be careful while managing them. You will deal with joint finances, debts, tax, PF, or insurance. There will be expenses, so you need to be prepared for that, and the full moon indicates you will complete some payments or you will get some pending amount. From various angles the relationship is showing significant changes, so make sure you are patient with everyone.

The transit Venus, is moving through the ninth house, so there will be updates from the foreign lands or you can expect long trips. You will receive an opportunity related to higher education, a journey, or something which push you to have different perspective about life and belief system. There will be paper work related to applications, and they can be about exams, enrolling in new courses, visa processing or some legal matters as well. You will also get some positive updates regarding these. Additionally, you will be interested in reading, writing and publishing your articles and your mentors will guide you in this.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: Your ruler Mars is moving through Aries, which rules your sixth house, so there will be a lot of events connected to your workplace, routines and health. Mars is conjunct Mercury, so you will have back to back discussions at work, but make sure you are not irritated, as Mars and Mercury are fast and furious planets. You will have to deal with a lot of tasks, deadlines or there will be quick changes in the projects. There will be minor issues related to your digestion, so your diet is very important, and make sure you get a good diet.

The Sun is moving through the seventh house and the full moon will rise in your sign, so there will be important developments in personal life and relationships. The Sun is not an ideal planet to be in the seventh house, so there will be some issues with people from personal or professional domain. They may question your commitment, or your involvement in the relationship. The full moon will bring minor health issues, and there will be completion in some of the personal issues, like closure of an issue. You will try to improve your appearance, so you can expect some beauty or health treatments.

Financially this week will be better as Venus is moving through Gemini, and it will nourish your eighth house, so sudden financial blessing will come up. You will have easy processing regarding your loans, tax, PF and insurance. There will be progress in the matter connected to joint ventures, and joint finances. However, you can expect sudden expenses, so please be prepared for that. There will be multiple opportunities to get freelance projects, so there will be more money. Your relationship issues will get solved, but it will take some more days, as Venus will be here.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: The transit Mars and Mercury are moving through the fifth house, so there will be plenty of events connected to children, creativity and romance. You will be spending more time in exploring your creative skills, and people will notice that, and you will surely get some beneficial opportunities too. This is the time for self-promotional activities, so you will go out and meet people, but there are chances for arguments too. You will also attend some social gatherings and entertainment programs with your team mates. Single Sagittarius, Sun, Moon and rising sign natives have the closest opportunities to find someone special, but those who are already in relationship may have issues. Parents will take crucial decisions in their children’s life.

The Sun is moving through the sixth house and the full moon will rise in the twelfth house, so there will be some physical and emotional concerns, but they will be temporary. Still, you need to be careful with your health, especially the mental health as the full moon is debilitated in Scorpio, and this full moon shows the need of healing. Please try to keep peace with your colleagues, as the workplace pressure can be the main reason for the health issues.

Venus is moving through Gemini, and this is a good period for new relationships from personal and professional domain. This Venus will bring short trips, opportunities for networking from personal and professional domain. You will have smooth conversations with your partner; they will try to support you. If you are a business owner, you will get the closest chances to get a new offer, or you will sign a new document. This transit also shows progress in the relationships, you will get a new contact, or you will find interesting people through social gatherings and business networking events. However, you don’t have to overshare your personal matters with anyone.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: The goats will have significant events at home, as the fourth house has Mars and Mercury so you will spend more time and money for family matters. You will be planning for home improvement projects, repairs, renovation or you will have relocation as well. People will be visiting your home, or you will go out to meet your family or friends. Family functions will be one of the significant events during this transit. At the same time, both the planets are not comfortable here, so there are chances for arguments within home, and the elderly family members will have some concerns.

At the same time Sun is moving through Taurus, and the full moon will rise in Scorpio which will bring some significant events regarding your creative self-expression and long term plans. You will get many opportunities to prove your creative skills, so you will be happy and people will notice you. There will be team discussions and brainstorming sessions coming up, so please be prepared for that. You were planning to join a new team for a long time, and this full moon will listen to those voices, and it will send some opportunities for that. Love and romance will be another major event of this week, and you will spend more time for the wellbeing of the children and youth.

Venus is moving through the sixth house, that shows fresh projects at work, and new colleagues, or some changes which are progressive in nature regarding your work. These projects can mainly come up from creative sector. Venus will bring solutions for workplace issues, and there will be better coordination with your colleagues. You will have to control your food intake as the sixth house also indicates health issues, and Venus will make you eat junk. This transit also supports some changes in the diet and you will try new workouts.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: The transit Mars and Mercury are moving through the third house, so, that will bring a lot of movement to your life. You will have a lot of short travels, meeting with your siblings, neighbours or your relatives. This transit is a bit complex, as there will be arguments with people around you as Mars and Mercury are very aggressive planets. You will get some updates through messages, news, or you will have direct conversations. This transit will also bring opportunities to write, read, learn and publish your articles. The neck to hand area will be very sensitive, so you will have to be careful with that.

The Sun is impacting the family matters, and the full moon will rise in the tenth house, so you will have significant events related to home and career. There will be family meetings, real estate deals, and home improvement projects. You can also expect family meetings where you meet your relatives but there are chances for potential arguments as well. The full moon indicates completions, so you will complete some projects at work, or you may even quit a job. This is a complex time for your career, as the full moon is debilitated so make sure you don’t create any issue at work.

Transit Venus is moving through the fifth house, so you will have progress in your love life. Single Aquarius natives will have the closest opportunities to find someone special, and those who are already in a relationship will solve their issues. Your creative skills will be noticed by others, and you will be able to deliver the maximum. This Venus indicates opportunities for social gatherings, and you will attend entertainment programs also. Parents will get some pleasant updates from children, and they will have better bonding. This is the closest chances to become an influencer, so use that opportunity too.

horoscopes.title: Pisces Weekly Horoscope Starting April 26
content: The importance of your finances is still on as Mars and Mercury are moving through the second house just like the last week, so you will have more expenses, but the chances for gains also will come up. These gains will come through you getting a new job, freelance opportunities or a contract job. You will have concerns regarding money, so be on the safer side, and cut off some expenses. This is a complex time for sure as there will be food related issues, anger issues, and arguments with your dear and near ones. If you are a business owner, please don’t take any solo decisions.

The solar transit is impacting your third house, and the full moon will rise in your ninth house, so there will be significant events coming up regarding your journeys. There will be short as well as long trips which can be tiring, but you will handle it. You will also get some updates regarding foreign trips and global ventures too. The importance of learning, coaching and teaching will increase, and you will surely get some benefit out of this. The third and ninth house indicates writing and media related work, so you will get such opportunities as well.

Venus is moving through the air sign of Gemini, so there will be some good events at home , as the fourth house indicates home. Venus will aspect the tenth house, so the career related good news also will be the part of this week. The family environment will improve, and you will have better bonding with family members. You will have real estate deals, repairs and renovation, so you will spend more money for that as well. Family functions, and meetings with friends also will be the part of this week. Additionally, you can expect fresh projects at work too.
